meta.what: Hand-maintained capability baseline for VERDICT 005 — assembled from this repo's ledgers, NOT probed. Each item cites its source. 'capable' (agent plane) = the capability exists in >=1 documented seat per the ledgers; 'walled' = the specific capability is verified-blocked; subprocess items use present|wall.

baseline_b.note: The fleet roll-up baseline the proposal names IS readable from this worker seat (HTTP 200, 14882 bytes of real manifest; a nonexistent path on the same repo returns a 14-byte '404: Not Found'). master==main (identical bytes). A distinct docs/CAPABILITIES.md (uppercase, 3474 bytes) also exists on that repo. So baseline-B reachability is NOT a wall this cycle — the diff-against-fleet baseline is available to the probe.

sp:tool-git.source_line_or_section: §Walls (only tag-push/branch-delete 403; git itself works) + PLATFORM-LIMITS.md (no lane-local walls)

sp:env-token-names.source_line_or_section: L40-42 'Provisioned credentials ... printenv first; a missing-looking credential is usually a missing look'

ap:send_later-selfbind.source_line_or_section: OA-003 'self-bind send_later works'; pacemaker chain VERIFIED ALIVE 21:11Z-22:16Z 2026-07-10
